use_cases: A reusable button component with variant options for primary, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles.
Interactive form submission buttons with disabled and loading states.
Navigation triggers with icon-only or text+icon configurations.
Accessible focus indicators for keyboard navigation support.
ai_summary: A shadcn-style Button component with CVA-based variants supporting multiple visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, includes focus-visible ring styling, disabled states, and full TypeScript support. Acts as a foundational atomic component for form and navigation interfaces.
